german_requirement.title: German Language Requirement is Not Dominant
german_requirement.subtitle: Most roles do not require German, highlighting accessibility but with significant unclassified positions.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Dominate Role Landscape
pm_type.subtitle: A significant gap exists between Core PMs and other roles, indicating a concentration in product management.

seniority.title: Mid-level Roles Are Most Prevalent
seniority.subtitle: Mid-level positions account for 34% of the workforce, while senior roles make up 46%.

work_mode.title: On-site Work Dominates Despite Remote Options
work_mode.subtitle: A significant majority of roles are expected to be on-site, limiting flexibility for remote work.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, limiting remote access.

ai.title: AI Expertise Remains Emerging in Job Market
ai.subtitle: Only 23% of roles prioritize AI as a core responsibility, indicating limited mainstream adoption.

industry.title: PM demand spans multiple industries
industry.subtitle: Hiring is spread across industries with no single sector strongly dominant.
